# MachLink China

> MachLink China sells inspected, export-ready **used (second-hand) milling machines from China** and ships them worldwide — especially to Africa, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia. Every machine is shown on video before payment. Buyers contact us on WhatsApp for price and video.

## Key facts
- Business: Used / second-hand milling machine supplier and exporter, based in China.
- Products: Turret mills, vertical knee-type mills (e.g. X5032), and drilling-milling machines (e.g. ZX6350). Chinese and imported brands.
- How buying works: Message on WhatsApp → we send a full video of the machine running → we quote price + sea freight to your port → you pay, we pack, document, and ship.
- Payment: T/T bank transfer or Western Union. Video inspection is always sent before payment.
- Minimum order: 1 machine (no minimum).
- Main markets served: Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, Tanzania, Uganda, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Vietnam, Philippines, Indonesia, and more.
- Contact: WhatsApp +86 150 1532 0471 · Email lip26333@gmail.com
- Languages: English, Chinese.

## Machines (detail pages)
- [4# Turret Mill](https://machlinkchina.cc.cd/machines/4-turret-mill.html): vertical turret milling machine with 2-axis DRO.
- [X6325 Turret Mill](https://machlinkchina.cc.cd/machines/x6325-turret-mill.html): compact vertical turret milling machine with 2-axis DRO.
- [X5032 Knee Mill](https://machlinkchina.cc.cd/machines/x5032-knee-mill.html): vertical knee-type milling machine, ISO 50 spindle, 7.5 kW.
- [X5032 Knee Mill — With Control Box](https://machlinkchina.cc.cd/machines/x5032-knee-mill-control-box.html): X5032 with an external electrical control box.
- [ZX50C Drill Mill](https://machlinkchina.cc.cd/machines/zx50c-drill-mill.html): compact drilling and milling machine, 50 mm drilling.
- [ZX6350 Drill Mill](https://machlinkchina.cc.cd/machines/zx6350-drill-mill.html): heavier drilling-milling machine, 80 mm milling, with 2-axis DRO.
